themes.reasoning_notes: Best in token decks: upgrades many small creatures into 4/4 flying Dragons, turning a wide board into a lethal closer.
Can destroy opposing creatures, but replaces each with a 4/4 Dragon, so it is conditional removal rather than clean answer.
Strong token-board payoff: turns expendable creatures into 4/4 flying Dragons, often functioning as a game-ending board upgrade.
It can target opposing creatures, but the replacement 4/4 Dragons make it poor as conventional removal outside niche cases.
